technical_replicate: We have employed 3D-super-resolution structured illumination microscopy (3D-SR-SIM) and mass-spectrometric (MS) analyses to gain insight into the assembly of ALIS.
experimental_design: Here we show that ALIS are assembled in macrophages upon exposure to different bacteria.
factor_value: bacterial strains (LPS, STM, M. smegmatis, E. coli K12, S. aureus, P. aeruginosa)

we exposed RAW GFP-LC3 cells to either mCherry expressing Salmonella Typhimurium (STM) or mRFP expressing Mycobacterium smegmatis or mCherry labeled E. coli K12 or pathogenic strain of Staphylococcus aureus (SA5) or Pseudomonas aeruginosa (PA1).
